    Index

    A C D F G I M P R S T V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addCash(Denomination) - Method in class CashStorage
    Adds cash to the Cash Vault
    addItem(Item) - Method in class Slots
    Adds an item to the arraylist without going out of bounds with regards to capacity

    C

    cancelTransaction() - Method in class Regular
    Cancels the transaction and returns inserted cash
    CashStorage - Class in Unnamed Package
    A Constructor class for Cash Storages/Vaults on the Vending Machine
    CashStorage(ArrayList) - Constructor for class CashStorage
    Creates a CashStorage with regards to the current PHP Denominations
    checkCash() - Method in class Regular
    Checks the total value of the denominations inserted
    checkChangeAvailability(double) - Method in class Regular
    checks for change availability by simulating the transaction first

    D

    Denomination - Class in Unnamed Package
    Constructor class for denomination object
    Denomination(double, int) - Constructor for class Denomination
    Creates a denomination object(bills and/or coins) with a value and quantity.
    dispenseItem(String) - Method in class Regular
    dispenses the item chosen to be purchased by the user
    displayInsert(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user control to insert denominations for purchase
    displayItems() - Method in class Regular
    Displays items on the slots on the vending machine
    displaySell(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user control to make a purchase Also handles the dispension of items and change

    F

    Factory - Class in Unnamed Package
    The Driver class of the Vending Machine Factory Simulator
    Factory() - Constructor for class Factory
     

    G

    getBeforeStock() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the number of items on the slot before restocking
    getCalories() - Method in class Item
    Gets the calories of the product
    getCapacity() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the capacity of the slot
    getCashList() - Method in class CashStorage
    Gets the arraylist holidng all denominations
    getCurrentStock() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the amount of stock currently in the slot
    getItem() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the item assigned to the slot
    getItemList() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the list of items in the slot
    getName() - Method in class Item
    Gets the product name
    getPrice() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the price of all items in the slot
    getQuantity() - Method in class Denomination
    Gets the quantity of the denomination
    getSize() - Method in class CashStorage
    Gets the number of denominations in the list
    getSold() - Method in class Slots
    Gets the number of sold items on this slot
    getValue() - Method in class Denomination
    Gets the value of the denomination
    giveChange(double) - Method in class Regular
    gives the change to the user after a successful transaction

    I

    incrementSold() - Method in class Slots
    Increments the sold counter when a transaction has been made
    Item - Class in Unnamed Package
    Constructor class for item (products)
    Item(String, double) - Constructor for class Item
    Creates an item object

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Factory
     
    manageCashStorage(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user to manage the cash vault and its contents
    management(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user controls to the management features of the vending machine
    manageSlot(int, Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows the management of the selected slot

    P

    printSpecificSummary(int, Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    prints a transaction summary with data from the last restocking/audit of the selected slot
    printTransactionSummary(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Prints a transaction summary with data from the last audit

    R

    recieveCash(Denomination) - Method in class Regular
    Recieves a denomination from the user.
    Regular - Class in Unnamed Package
    Constructor class for a Regular Vending Machine
    Regular() - Constructor for class Regular
    Creates a Regular vending Machine
    removeCash(Denomination) - Method in class CashStorage
    Removes a certain amount of a denomination
    removeDenomination(double) - Method in class CashStorage
    Removes a denomination from the cash vault
    removeItem(Item) - Method in class Slots
    Removes an item from the arraylist
    resetSold() - Method in class Slots
    Resets the sold counter after an audit
    returnCash() - Method in class Regular
    Returns the cash inserted by the user back

    S

    selectSlot(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user to choose which slot to manage
    setBeforeStock(int) - Method in class Slots
    Sets the number of stock in the slot before the next modifying of stock amounts and auditing
    setItem(Item) - Method in class Slots
    Sets the item assigned to slot
    setPrice(double) - Method in class Slots
    Sets the price of the items on the slot
    setQuantity(int) - Method in class Denomination
    Updates the quantity of the denomination
    slotFinder(String) - Method in class Regular
    A helper method used to find a slot that contains a specific item
    Slots - Class in Unnamed Package
    The Constructor Class for the Vending Machine Slots
    Slots(Item, int, double) - Constructor for class Slots
    Creates a slot for the vending machine

    T

    transferCashToStorage() - Method in class Regular
    transfers the cash recieved after a successful transaction to the vending machine's cash storage

    V

    validDenomination(double) - Method in class Regular
    Checks if the denomination that is being inserted is to be accepted by the machine
    vending(Scanner) - Method in class Regular
    Displays and allows user controls to the vending features of the vending machine
